'''darubu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kylin|kylin]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-r-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kylin|kylin]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| darubu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dæribith|dæribith]] || [[word:dæribij|dæribij]] || [[word:dæribish|dæribish]] || [[word:dæribi|dæribi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:darurubuth|darurubuth]] || [[word:darurubuj|darurubuj]] || [[word:darurubush|darurubush]] || [[word:darurubu|darurubu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:darubuth|darubuth]] || [[word:darubuj|darubuj]] || [[word:darubush|darubush]] || [[word:darubu|darubu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:darufbuth|darufbuth]] || [[word:darufbuj|darufbuj]] || [[word:darufbush|darufbush]] || [[word:darufbuf|darufbuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:darubuthu|darubuthu]] || [[word:darubuju|darubuju]] || [[word:darubushu|darubushu]] || [[word:darubuku|darubuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:darubuth|darubuth]] || [[word:darubuj|darubuj]] || [[word:darubush|darubush]] || [[word:darubu|darubu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:darubuthul|darubuthul]] || [[word:darubujul|darubujul]] || [[word:darubushul|darubushul]] || [[word:darubukul|darubukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:darubuthuthu|darubuthuthu]] || [[word:darubujuju|darubujuju]] || [[word:darubushushu|darubushushu]] || [[word:darubuku|darubuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:darubuthun|darubuthun]] || [[word:darubujun|darubujun]] || [[word:darubushun|darubushun]] || [[word:darubukun|darubukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:darubuthuoro|darubuthuoro]] || [[word:darubujuoro|darubujuoro]] || [[word:darubushuoro|darubushuoro]] || [[word:darubukuoro|darubukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|eda3f80}}
